SubjectDepthSlider.description: Premium range slider control used in the Spatial Knowledge Graph top-bar for setting subject hierarchy depth.
SubjectDepthSlider.containerClass: flex items-center gap-3 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md rounded-xl border border-[#899981]/15 px-4 py-2 shadow-sm
SubjectDepthSlider.sliderClass: subject-depth-slider w-28 h-1.5 appearance-none rounded-full outline-none bg-tertiary cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-150
SubjectDepthSlider.thumbClass: ::-webkit-slider-thumb width-16 height-16 border-2-white border-radius-50 gradient-primary shadow-sm hover-scale-1.25 hover-shadow active-scale-0.95 transition-transform duration-100
SubjectDepthSlider.valueBadgeClass: flex items-center justify-center w-5 h-5 bg-[#899981]/10 rounded-full text-[10px] font-black text-[#899981]

SpatialGraphModal.description: Full screen overlay modal with a blurred backdrop containing the 3D canvas and controls.
SpatialGraphModal.backdropClass: fixed inset-0 bg-stone-900/40 backdrop-blur-md z-[999] flex items-center justify-center p-6 animate-fade-in
SpatialGraphModal.containerClass: relative w-full h-full max-w-7xl max-h-[85vh] bg-[#FBF9F7]/95 rounded-2xl shadow-2xl border border-stone-200/50 flex flex-col overflow-hidden
SpatialGraphModal.headerClass: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-stone-200/50 px-6 py-4 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm
SpatialGraphModal.sidebarClass: w-64 border-r border-stone-200/50 p-6 flex flex-col gap-6 bg-stone-50/50

OatmealControls.description: Standardized form controls matching the warm-minimal Oatmeal style.
OatmealControls.booleanSwitchClass: relative w-11 h-6 bg-stone-200 rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 peer-checked:bg-[#899981]/80 cursor-pointer
OatmealControls.switchThumbClass: absolute top-0.5 left-0.5 w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full transition-transform duration-200 peer-checked:translate-x-5 shadow-sm
OatmealControls.secondaryButtonClass: px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-stone-700 bg-stone-100 border border-stone-200 hover:bg-stone-200/80 active:scale-98 transition-all text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
